summary: Travel journey app where users can create multiple journeys per city, each with their own independent travelogue. Currently working on scoping travelogue/schedule items per journey ID so each journey title has its own entries.
architectural_notes: Travelogue/schedule items should be keyed by journeyId (not cityId) so multiple journeys to the same city each have independent entries
Journey ID (tied to journey title) is the primary key for scoping all travelogue entries
known_issues: Multiple journeys for the same city currently share the same travelogue/schedule items instead of having independent ones
Repeated AI context limit failures when attempting backend data model changes to scope items per journey

existing_features.title: In TraveloguePanel.tsx, when displaying schedule items for a selected journey, filter the schedule items by the journey's unique ID so that only items belonging to that specific journey are shown. Each journey title must display only its own travelogue entries, independent of other journeys that share the same city.

new_feature_requests.summary: Scope travelogue entries by journey ID on the frontend so each journey has its own independent travelogue
